---
title: "JonFinger Home"
page-layout: full
body-classes: page-projects
---

::: {.hud-grid}
::: {.hero-block .hero-block--trainer}
::: {.trainer-hero}
::: {.trainer-hero__scene}
::: {.trainer-hero__panel}
::: {.trainer-hero__screen}
::: {.trainer-hero__name}
Jon
:::
::: {.trainer-hero__sprite}
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.status-panel}
::: {.status-panel__title}
Stats
:::

<p>&gt; Type: Data Scientist</p>
<p>&gt; Category: Coder</p>
<p>&gt; Region: USA</p>
<p>&gt; Strength: Professing</p>
<p>&gt; Weakness: Gluten</p>
:::

::: {.section-label}
Current Skills
:::

::: {#project-grid .project-grid}
:::

<script type="application/json" id="project-data">
[
  {
    "title": "Useless Tools",
    "summary": "A collection of useless tools that approach generating insights and shareholder value with malicious compliance.",
    "tags": ["JavaScript", "Web"],
    "url": "https://uselesstools.jonfinger.com/"
  },
  {
    "title": "Stackscenes",
    "summary": "In development: an attempt at creating a cinematic experience from human-created TCG stories.",
    "tags": ["In Development", "Data Science", "Python"],
    "url": "https://github.com/jonfinger/stackscenes/blob/main/README.md"
  },
  {
    "title": "Biology Masters Thesis",
    "summary": "Graduate thesis on modeling range expansion of an invasive species.",
    "tags": ["Paper"],
    "url": "https://www.dissertations.wsu.edu/Thesis/Spring2018/J_Finger_041718.pdf"
  }
]
</script>

::: {.dispatch-panel}
::: {.dispatch-panel__label}
Party Options
:::

::: {.dispatch-grid}
::: {.dispatch-item}
[All Trainer Notes](blog.qmd)
:::

::: {.dispatch-item}
[Read: Cost Curves](posts/2026-02-28-maybe-we-didnt-think-about-cost-enough.qmd)
:::

::: {.dispatch-item}
[Read: Productivity & Angst](posts/2026-02-23-ai-is-accelerating-productivity-and-angst.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

:::
